title: Hurt
meaning_summary: Its emotional directness and long cultural afterlife keep it durable as both a catalog listen and a song people continue to rediscover.
revenue_drivers: Long-tail streaming and alternative-catalog listening sustain recurring plays.
The song's emotional weight supports continued rediscovery and reuse.
Strong songwriter-side value helps retain meaningful earnings around the recording.

earnings.assumptions: Estimate keeps the headline range as the artist-side figure and models gross track, label, publishing, and songwriter lanes from that conservative annual range.

ownership.master_owner: Likely controlled through the recording label or distributor unless a specific rights sale is known
ownership.publishing_owner: Writer and publisher splits affect the publishing share shown here
ownership.catalog_sale_status: No specific catalog sale adjustment is modeled for this track
ownership.notes: Hurt is modeled from public-facing catalog behavior and conservative rights-split assumptions, not from audited royalty statements.
